zh.lifeSummary: 當Fulk FitzWarin IV於大約1208年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾阿爾維斯頓時，他的父親Fulk FitzWarin III49歲，母親Maud Le Vavasour33歲。他和Margaret de la Pole至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1264年5月14日在英國素可列維斯享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可列維斯。

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Fulk FitzWarin IV was born about 1208, in Alveston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Fulk FitzWarin III, was 49 and his mother, Maud Le Vavasour, was 33. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Margaret de la Pole. He died on 14 May 1264, in Lewes, Sussex, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fulk FitzWarin IV est né environ 1208, à Alveston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Fulk FitzWarin III, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Maud Le Vavasour, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Margaret de la Pole. Il est décédé le 14 mai 1264, à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hatte mit Margaret de la Pole mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. Mai 1264 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Lewes, Sussex, England und wurde in Lewes, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Fulk FitzWarin IVが約1208年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアアルベストンで生まれた時，父Fulk FitzWarin IIIは49歳，母Maud Le Vavasourは33歳であった。彼はMargaret de la Poleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1264年5月14日にイギリススセックスルスで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスルスにて埋葬された。

ko.Hazlewood With Storiths, Yorkshire, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하즐루드 위스 스토리스
ko.lifeSummary: Fulk FitzWarin IV(이)가 대략 1208년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 앨베스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fulk FitzWarin III(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Le Vavasour(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Margaret de la Pole(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1264년 5월 14일 영국 수세스 루스에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 루스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fulk FitzWarin IV nasceu aproximadamente 1208, em Alveston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Fulk FitzWarin III, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Maud Le Vavasour, tinha 33 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Margaret de la Pole. Ele faleceu em 14 de maio de 1264, em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Hazlewood With Storiths, Yorkshire, Engl: хазльвуд вит сторитс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fulk FitzWarin IV родился около 1208 г. в местности алвестон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Fulk FitzWarin III было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Le Vavasour, 33. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Margaret de la Pole. Он умер 14 мая 1264 г. в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
